eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 3:02 PM on JUL 9, 2026 Effective until 3:02 PM JUL 10, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/09/2026
There is a wildfire near Rolling Ridge & Marble Canyon Way, Cordes Lakes GO Status for YCU-2336 Gather essential supplies. Prepare in case of evacuation.https://go.genasys.com/zoajut
